spec_match.rationale: Correctly maps the Summarizer interface options and shows full-response and streaming variants.

interactive.rationale: Allows interactive typing of arbitrary text and demonstrates both standard and streaming summarization buttons.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The explanation perfectly matches the built-in AI feature description of the Summarizer API.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles missing browser support gracefully using a robust heuristic fallback and includes Chrome flags setup warning.

references.rationale: References the official Chrome AI Summarizer docs, spec link, and the ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Clean design with high-contrast styled textareas and buttons.

summary: Robust basic demo of the Summarizer API featuring streaming, standard callbacks, and clean heuristic fallback.
